Untitled UI Pro — extracted

MIT open-source base + recreated Pro templates. Clawmachine internal reference pool.

14 component pages 20 template pages (8 free + 12 pro) 15,566 icons in 4 styles 294 MIT-licensed .tsx files in raw/untitled-ui-react/ v8 / Tailwind v4.2 / React 19.2

Components

Inline-CSS, framework-free HTML demos of every core component.

tokens.json

Buttons

5 sizes x 9 colors, icons, loading, groups, social.

Inputs

Text, email, search, textarea, pin, error/disabled states.

Selects & Menus

Combobox, multi-select, command menu, dropdown panels.

Checkbox, Radio, Toggle

Form selection primitives with hints and card variants.

Badges & Tags

3 sizes x 13 colors x 3 styles. Dots, icons, removable tags.

Avatars

6 sizes, status, verified, groups, label groups.

Featured icons

4 sizes x 6 themes x 5 color tracks.

Alerts & Banners

Inline alerts, feature banners, dismissable top bars.

Modals, Drawers, Sheets

Destructive confirm, feature modal, side drawer.

Tooltips & Popovers

Dark tooltip, rich user card, notification popover.

Tabs, Crumbs, Pagination

Horizontal/vertical tabs, breadcrumbs, steppers.

Tables

Avatar cells, status badges, sort, filters, selection.

File upload

Dropzone + per-file progress + error row.

Date picker

Single-date, range-select with preset toolbar.

Empty states

Zero-search, first-run, error-recovery patterns.

Sliders & Progress

Range sliders, linear, segmented, circular progress.

Templates

Full-page shells and marketing layouts, recreated in the Untitled language.

Landing page

Hero, features grid, CTA, footer, announcement bar.

Dashboard

Sidebar shell + 4-metric row + chart + activity feed.

Pricing

3-tier plan comparison with billing toggle.

Sign in

Split hero with testimonial aside.

Sign up

Centered card with social + email signup.

Forgot password

Reset flow with back-to-login link.

Settings

Two-column form-shell with photo upload.

Checkout

Contact + delivery + payment + sticky summary.

Pro templates

12 Pro-tier marketing + info templates synthesised in the same token grammar.

Pro tier

Feature grid

3-column feature cards + 6-tile bento.

Logo cloud

Dense row + monogram badge + marquee scroll.

Testimonials

3 cards + branded hero + carousel variant.

FAQ

Accordion grid with filter sidebar.

CTA section

3 variants: dark hero + brand split + newsletter.

Footer

4-column + newsletter + minimal variants.

About

Hero + stats + team grid + timeline story.

Blog index

9-post card grid + tab filters + pagination.

Case study

Long-scroll shell with sticky TOC + stats strip.

404 & 500

Paired error pages with status code art.

Empty states

12 patterns with copy + primary action.

Pricing comparison

4-tier wide table with group headers.

Icons 4K Synth

15,566 icons in four styles — stroke / solid / duotone / duocolor — across icons-4k-synth/.

Browse 15,566 icons

Stroke 3,494 · Solid 5,658 · Duotone 3,207 · Duocolor 3,207. 20-column lazy-load gallery.

Acquisition method & license

See LICENSE_NOTE.md for per-asset provenance.

MethodWhat it coversLicense basis
Cloned (MIT)294 React components under raw/untitled-ui-react/, full tokens & stylesMIT (Copyright 2025 Untitled UI). Unrestricted internal + commercial.
ScrapedMarketing/Pro reference pages as raw HTML at raw/scraped/Private research, UK fair dealing for non-commercial study.
Recreated14 component HTML demos + 8 template HTML shells in this folderIndependent expression using the MIT design tokens (colors/type/spacing are themselves MIT per styles/theme.css).
Tokens portdesign.css + tokens.json derived from the MIT theme.cssMIT (same copyright).
Untitled UI Pro — extracted for Clawmachine project. Internal reference only.
